summary.title: Kernel Ephemeral Plugin Gating Validation
summary.description: Validation of Kernel ephemeral plugin gating to ensure temporary plugins are blocked in production environments. Ephemeral plugins are designed for development and testing purposes and should not be loaded in production to prevent security risks and instability.

ephemeralPluginGating.purpose: Prevents ephemeral plugins from being loaded in production environments to maintain system stability and security.

hardeningFeatures.description: PluginManifest includes an ephemeral boolean field to indicate whether a plugin is temporary and should be gated in production.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: PluginManifest class has ephemeral field with isEphemeral() getter. Builder has ephemeral(boolean) method. Defaults to false.
validationRules: Ephemeral field can be set to true for temporary plugins
Ephemeral field can be explicitly set to false for persistent plugins
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: PluginManifestEphemeralField nested test class with 3 tests

hardeningFeatures.description: Ephemeral plugins are blocked from loading in production environments.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: PluginLoader.loadPlugin() checks isProductionEnvironment() and plugin.getManifest().isEphemeral(). If both are true, the plugin is skipped with a warning log.
validationRules: Ephemeral plugins are blocked in production environment
Non-ephemeral plugins are allowed in production environment
Blocking is enforced via environment detection before plugin registration
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: ProductionEnvironmentGating nested test class with 3 tests

hardeningFeatures.description: Ephemeral plugins are allowed in non-production environments (development, test, staging).
hardeningFeatures.implementation: Environment detection only blocks in production. All other environments allow ephemeral plugins.
validationRules: Ephemeral plugins are allowed in development environment
Ephemeral plugins are allowed in test environment
Ephemeral plugins are allowed in staging environment
Ephemeral plugins are allowed when no environment is set (default to non-production)
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: NonProductionEnvironment nested test class with 4 tests

hardeningFeatures.description: Detects production environment through multiple environment variables and system properties.
hardeningFeatures.implementation: isProductionEnvironment() checks ENVIRONMENT, NODE_ENV environment variables, and environment system property. Returns true if value is 'prod' or 'production' (case-insensitive).
validationRules: Returns false if no environment is set (defaults to non-production)
hardeningFeatures.testCoverage: Environment detection is tested through production/non-production test scenarios

testCategories.name: Production Environment Gating
testCategories.coverage: Blocks ephemeral plugin in production, allows non-ephemeral plugin in production, blocks ephemeral plugin via ENVIRONMENT env var

testCategories.name: Non-Production Environment
testCategories.coverage: Allows ephemeral plugin in development, allows ephemeral plugin in test, allows ephemeral plugin in staging, allows ephemeral plugin when no environment is set

testCategories.name: Plugin Manifest Ephemeral Field
testCategories.coverage: Ephemeral defaults to false, ephemeral can be set to true, ephemeral can be set to false explicitly

securityConsiderations: Ephemeral plugins are blocked in production to prevent unauthorized temporary code execution
Environment detection uses multiple sources to prevent bypass
Case-insensitive comparison prevents environment string mismatch
Default to non-production when environment is not set prevents accidental production blocking in development

pluginManifest.purpose: Plugin metadata container including ephemeral field

pluginLoader.purpose: Dynamic plugin loading with ephemeral plugin gating

pluginSecurityManager.purpose: Plugin security manager with signature validation and permission verification

productionTruthGuarantees: Ephemeral plugins cannot be loaded in production environments
Environment detection is robust with multiple fallback sources
Non-ephemeral plugins are always allowed regardless of environment
Ephemeral field defaults to false to prevent accidental gating
notes: Ephemeral plugin gating is implemented in PluginLoader.loadPlugin()
Environment detection checks multiple sources (ENVIRONMENT, NODE_ENV, system property)
Ephemeral field defaults to false to prevent accidental gating
Test coverage includes all environment scenarios
Production truth is maintained through environment-based gating
